'''鈭歠-y-t''' ('''kafayat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:peg|peg]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-y-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:peg|peg]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-y-t
|-
! Lemma
| kafayat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifayat|thifayat]] || [[word:jifayat|jifayat]] || [[word:shifayat|shifayat]] || [[word:kifayat|kifayat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufayat|thuthufayat]] || [[word:jujufayat|jujufayat]] || [[word:shushufayat|shushufayat]] || [[word:kukufayat|kukufayat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufayat|thufayat]] || [[word:jufayat|jufayat]] || [[word:shufayat|shufayat]] || [[word:kufayat|kufayat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufayat|thufayat]] || [[word:jufayat|jufayat]] || [[word:shufayat|shufayat]] || [[word:kufayat|kufayat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefayat|thefayat]] || [[word:jefayat|jefayat]] || [[word:shefayat|shefayat]] || [[word:kefayat|kefayat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofayat|thothofayat]] || [[word:jojofayat|jojofayat]] || [[word:shoshofayat|shoshofayat]] || [[word:kokofayat|kokofayat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofayat|thofayat]] || [[word:jofayat|jofayat]] || [[word:shofayat|shofayat]] || [[word:kofayat|kofayat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofayat|thofayat]] || [[word:jofayat|jofayat]] || [[word:shofayat|shofayat]] || [[word:kofayat|kofayat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fayat|fayat]] || [[word:fayat|fayat]] || [[word:fayat|fayat]] || [[word:fayat|fayat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fayat|fayat]] || [[word:fayat|fayat]] || [[word:fayat|fayat]] || [[word:fayat|fayat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fayat|fayat]] || [[word:fayat|fayat]] || [[word:fayat|fayat]] || [[word:fayat|fayat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fayat|fayat]] || [[word:fayat|fayat]] || [[word:fayat|fayat]] || [[word:fayat|fayat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fayat|th忙fayat]] || [[word:j忙fayat|j忙fayat]] || [[word:sh忙fayat|sh忙fayat]] || [[word:k忙fayat|k忙fayat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafayat|thathafayat]] || [[word:jajafayat|jajafayat]] || [[word:shashafayat|shashafayat]] || [[word:kakafayat|kakafayat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafayat|thafayat]] || [[word:jafayat|jafayat]] || [[word:shafayat|shafayat]] || [[word:kafayat|kafayat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafayat|thafayat]] || [[word:jafayat|jafayat]] || [[word:shafayat|shafayat]] || [[word:kafayat|kafayat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafayat|shafayat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafayat|goshafayat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafayat|gokishafayat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafayatn眉|shafayatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafayatnkn眉|goshafayatnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafayatn眉|gokishafayatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafayatsh毛|shafayatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafayatnksh毛|goshafayatnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafayatsh毛|gokishafayatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafayatro|shafayatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafayatnkro|goshafayatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafayatro|gokishafayatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafayatmu|shafayatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafayatnkmu|goshafayatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafayatmu|gokishafayatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafayatsher|shafayatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafayatnksher|goshafayatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafayatsher|gokishafayatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafayatng|shafayatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafayatnkng|goshafayatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafayatng|gokishafayatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafayatya|shafayatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafayatnkya|goshafayatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafayatya|gokishafayatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafayatyam|shafayatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafayatnkyam|goshafayatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafayatyam|gokishafayatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafayatn眉sh毛|shafayatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafayatnkn眉sh毛|goshafayatnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafayatn眉sh毛|gokishafayatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafayatn眉ro|shafayatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafayatnkn眉ro|goshafayatnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafayatn眉ro|gokishafayatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafayatn眉mu|shafayatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafayatnkn眉mu|goshafayatnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafayatn眉mu|gokishafayatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafayatsh毛n眉|shafayatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafayatnksh毛n眉|goshafayatnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafayatsh毛n眉|gokishafayatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafayatsh毛ro|shafayatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafayatnksh毛ro|goshafayatnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafayatsh毛ro|gokishafayatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafayatsh毛mu|shafayatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafayatnksh毛mu|goshafayatnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafayatsh毛mu|gokishafayatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafayatron眉|shafayatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafayatnkron眉|goshafayatnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafayatron眉|gokishafayatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafayatrosh毛|shafayatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafayatnkrosh毛|goshafayatnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafayatrosh毛|gokishafayatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafayatromu|shafayatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafayatnkromu|goshafayatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafayatromu|gokishafayatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafayatmun眉|shafayatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafayatnkmun眉|goshafayatnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafayatmun眉|gokishafayatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafayatmush毛|shafayatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafayatnkmush毛|goshafayatnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafayatmush毛|gokishafayatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafayatmuro|shafayatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafayatnkmuro|goshafayatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafayatmuro|gokishafayatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
